---
title: "run_experiment_4"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#install.packages("kmed")
#install.packages("mclust")

library(kmed)
library(mclust)
library(dplyr)

# ── Funciones ─────────────────────────────────────────
permutations <- function(x) {
  if (length(x) == 1) return(matrix(x))
  do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(x), function(i) {
    cbind(x[i], permutations(x[-i]))
  }))
}

adjusted_score <- function(y_pred, y_true, metric) {
  
  unique_pred  <- sort(unique(y_pred))
  unique_true  <- sort(unique(y_true))  # ← usar etiquetas de y_true como destino
  perms_list   <- permutations(unique_true)  # ← permutar sobre y_true
  
  best_score  <- -Inf
  best_labels <- NULL
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(perms_list))) {
    perm            <- perms_list[i, ]
    perm_dict       <- setNames(perm, unique_pred)  # mapear y_pred → y_true
    permuted_labels <- perm_dict[as.character(y_pred)]
    score           <- metric(y_true, permuted_labels)
    
    if (score > best_score) {
      best_score  <- score
      best_labels <- permuted_labels
    }
  }
  
  return(list(
    adj_score          = best_score,
    adj_cluster_labels = unname(best_labels)
  ))
}

accuracy <- function(y_true, y_pred) {
  mean(as.integer(y_true) == as.integer(y_pred))
}

# ── Cargar datos ───────────────────────────────────────
ruta_folder     <- "../../../data/skm_budiaji/simulations_data"
rutas_completas <- list.files(path = ruta_folder, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
nombres_archivos <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(rutas_completas))
lista_csvs      <- lapply(rutas_completas, read.csv)
names(lista_csvs) <- nombres_archivos

# ── Configuración ─────────────────────────────────────
EXPERIMENT_RANDOM_STATE <- 123
DATA_IDS                <- c(
    'simulation_base', 
    'simulation_outliers_2',
    'simulation_outliers_6',
    'simulation_sphericity_outliers_1',
    'simulation_sphericity_outliers_2'
)
ITERS                   <- 0:24
N_ROWS                  <- 1000 # 10000
NCLUST_SKM              <- 3
SEEDING_SKM             <- 20
ITERATE_SKM             <- 10
IDNUM_SKM               <- 1:4
IDBIN_SKM               <- 5:6
IDCAT_SKM               <- 7:8
DISTANCE_SKM            <- "gower"

# ── Inicializar contenedor de resultados ──────────────
results <- data.frame(
  data_id      = character(),
  iteration    = integer(),
  adj_acc      = numeric(),
  ARI          = numeric(),
  elapsed_time = numeric()
)

# ── Loop principal ────────────────────────────────────
for (data_id in DATA_IDS) {
  for (i in ITERS) {

    x_key <- sprintf("X_%s_iter_%d", data_id, i)
    y_key <- sprintf("y_%s_iter_%d", data_id, i)

    cat(sprintf("Procesando %s, iter %d ...\n", data_id, i))

    tryCatch({

      X_df <- as.data.frame(lista_csvs[[x_key]])
      y_df <- as.data.frame(lista_csvs[[y_key]])

      start <- proc.time()

      dist_X <- distmix(X_df[1:N_ROWS, ], method = DISTANCE_SKM,
                        idnum = IDNUM_SKM, idbin = IDBIN_SKM, idcat = IDCAT_SKM)

      set.seed(EXPERIMENT_RANDOM_STATE)
      clustering_result <- skm(dist_X, ncluster = NCLUST_SKM,
                                seeding = SEEDING_SKM, iterate = ITERATE_SKM)

      end <- proc.time()

      y_true <- as.integer(y_df[1:N_ROWS, 1])
      y_pred <- clustering_result$cluster

      results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
        data_id      = data_id,
        iteration    = i,
        adj_acc      = adjusted_score(y_pred, y_true, accuracy)$adj_score,
        ARI          = adjustedRandIndex(y_true, y_pred),
        elapsed_time = (end - start)["elapsed"]
      ))

    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("  !! Error en %s iter %d: %s\n", data_id, i, e$message))
    })
  }
}

# ── Resumen agrupado por data_id ──────────────────────
summary_results <- results %>%
  group_by(data_id) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_adj_accuracy = mean(adj_acc,      na.rm = TRUE),
    std_adj_accuracy  = sd(adj_acc,        na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_ari          = mean(ARI,          na.rm = TRUE),
    std_ari           = sd(ARI,            na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_time         = mean(elapsed_time, na.rm = TRUE),
    std_time          = sd(elapsed_time,   na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_status_error = 0.0,
    model_name        = "skm"
  )
```

``` {r}
results
```

```{r}
summary_results
```


```{r}
# ── Guardar resultados ────────────────────────────────
output_dir <- "../../../data/skm_budiaji/results"
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

write.csv(results,
          file.path(output_dir, "results_exp_4_skm_budiaji.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(summary_results,
          file.path(output_dir, "avg_results_exp_4_skm_budiaji.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```
